scripts.build: bun build ./src/index.ts --outdir dist --target bun && bun build ./src/mcp.ts --outdir dist --target bun && bun build ./src/cli/index.ts --outdir dist/cli --target bun && bun build ./src/hooks/session-start-hook.ts --outdir dist/hooks --target bun && bun build ./src/hooks/stop-hook.ts --outdir dist/hooks --target bun && mkdir -p dist/commands && cp src/commands/*.md dist/commands/
scripts.prepublishOnly: bun build ./src/index.ts --outdir dist --target bun && bun build ./src/mcp.ts --outdir dist --target bun && bun build ./src/cli/index.ts --outdir dist/cli --target bun && bun build ./src/hooks/session-start-hook.ts --outdir dist/hooks --target bun && bun build ./src/hooks/stop-hook.ts --outdir dist/hooks --target bun && mkdir -p dist/commands && cp src/commands/*.md dist/commands/
